title: Robot Dreams
tmdbOverview: A lonely dog's friendship with his robot companion takes a sad turn when an unexpected malfunction forces him to abandon Robot at the beach. Will Dog ever meet Robot again?
synopsis: Released in 2023, Robot Dreams is a animation, drama and comedy film from Spain and France. It holds a solid 7.6 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2020s and genre rankings. It carries a PG-13 certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
